ModMetadata.Name: ZoopMod [StationeersLaunchPad]
ModMetadata.Author: Nivvdiy, MerGatto
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]ZoopMod[/h1]
[b]WARNING:[/b] This mod requires the StationeersLaunchPad Plugin and BepInEx to be installed. For installation, see the detailed guide at: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
If you have an older loader setup installed, please remove it and use StationeersLaunchPad instead.
Please ensure you are unsubscribed from older versions of this mod: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3182410797
Works when joining a multiplayer server as a client.
[b]Cables, Pipes, Chutes[/b] Allows you to build long lines between two points in a single action. Waypoints can be added to control the path more precisely. Lines cannot exceed the amount of building materials in your inventory.
[b]Frames, Walls[/b] Allows you to build large surfaces between two points. Zooping creates the largest possible surface; building full cubes is not supported in zoop mode. Frames cannot be placed if another frame, wall, or large structure is in the way (to prevent errors and incorrect item consumption). No waypoints are available for frames and walls.
[b]Additions:[/b] [list] [*]Fix for completion time, ensuring consistency in subsequent building actions. [*]Key bindings. [*]Authoring tool support. [*]Zooping for frames. [*]Multiplayer client support. [*]Zooping for walls. [*]Compatibility with The Gases Update. [/list]
[b]Usage:[/b] While in construction mode, hold [b]Left Shift[/b] [i](default)[/i] and press the primary action, then move the mouse to zoop. Hold the primary action to complete.
Alternatively, press [b]Z[/b] [i](default)[/i] once to start zooping without holding + clicking.
You can add a waypoint by pressing [b]middle mouse button[/b] [i](default)[/i], and remove the last one with [b]V[/b] [i](default)[/i].
All keys can be customized in the Stationeers settings.
[b]Special thanks to:[/b] [list] [*]Elmotrix for the original mod [*]jixxed for the advanced version [*]Katsuk for the updated version [*]tsholmes for somes fixes [*]The Stationeers community for their support and feedback [/list]
[b]Respect note:[/b] This continuation is being developed collaboratively, with respect for the mod's previous maintainers.
[i]"If I have seen further, it is by standing on the shoulders of giants." – Isaac Newton[/i]
[b]TODO:[/b] [list] [*][x]Work on client side [*][x]Work with authoring tool [*][x]Add waypoints functionality (Version 2024.16.08) [*][x]Add zooping for frames (Version 2024.30.10) [*][x]Add possibility to zoop windowed chute (Version 2024.27.10) [*][x]Add zooping for wall [*][x]Add option to prefer long pieces, eg for chutes and pipes [*][ ]Add zooping for LArRE rails [/list]
[b]Actually working on[/b] No work in progress at the moment.
[b]Known Issues:[/b] [list] [*][strike]Does not currently work in Authoring mode.[/strike] (Fixed in version 2024.17.10.01) [*][strike]The mod is always in CreativeFreedom mode, even without the CreativeFreedom mod installed.[/strike] [/list]
[b]Works for:[/b] [list] [*]"The Gases Update" (March 19, 2026) [*]"Bug Fixing" update (December 12, 2024) [*]"Emergency Kit: Gas Masks and Engine Upgrade" update (December 11, 2024) [*]"Short Circuit: Liquid Device Interactions" update (October 28, 2024) [*]"In World Water" update (October 11, 2024) [*]"Bug Fixing" update (August 13, 2024) [*]"Tutorials and Helper Hints" update (August 5, 2024) [/list]
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: ZoopMod Maintained by: Nivvdiy and MerGatto WARNING: This mod requires the StationeersLaunchPad Plugin and BepInEx to function properly. Make sure you are unsubscribed from any previous versions. Installation details are available at https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad. Compatible with The Gases Update and works when joining multiplayer servers as a client. Cables, Pipes, Chutes Allows you to build long lines between two points in a single action. Waypoints can be added to control path more precisely. Lines cannot exceed the quantity of building materials in hand. Frames, Walls Allows you to build large surfaces between two points. Zooping creates the largest possible surface; building full cubes is not supported in zoop mode. Frames cannot be placed if another frame, wall, or large structure is in the way (to prevent errors and incorrect item consumption). No waypoints for frames and walls.
